parameters.name: list_files
parameters.description: List files and folders in a Nextcloud directory. Parameters: path (optional, default / for root directory, e.g. /Documents or /Photos/2026)

parameters.name: read_file
parameters.description: Read the text content of a file on Nextcloud. Works best with text files (.txt, .md, .csv, .json, .xml). Parameters: path (file path, e.g. /Documents/notes.txt)

parameters.name: write_file
parameters.description: Create or overwrite a file on Nextcloud with text content. Parent folders are created automatically. Parameters: path (file path, e.g. /Documents/notes.txt), content (text content to write)

parameters.name: upload_from_url
parameters.description: Download a file from a URL and save it to Nextcloud. Use this to upload images, PDFs, or any file from the internet or Telegram file URLs. Parameters: url (source URL to download from), path (destination path on Nextcloud, e.g. /Photos/image.jpg)

parameters.name: create_folder
parameters.description: Create a new folder on Nextcloud. Parameters: path (folder path to create, e.g. /Projects/NewProject)

parameters.name: delete_file
parameters.description: Delete a file or folder on Nextcloud. Deleting a folder removes all its contents. Parameters: path (path to delete, e.g. /Documents/old-file.txt)

parameters.name: move_file
parameters.description: Move or rename a file or folder on Nextcloud. Parameters: source (current path, e.g. /Documents/old-name.txt), destination (new path, e.g. /Archive/new-name.txt)
